text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! I finish exquisitely once again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not lament so, my dear Vodka! You fell to
none other than me, an insurmountable foe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
From the start, my running was not only
impeccable—it was flawless. Compound that with
my Overlord Training and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Here I stand! Having climbed another level,
having reached a new height of excellence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, for it was crafted by my trainer
specifically for me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Keenly designed to account for my unique
physique, it allows my radiance to grow brighter
by the day!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! I guess a good training regimen really does makes the difference!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be so cool to get that kind of advice
from your very own trainer.
choice_data_list: Effort is what makes the difference.
Effort is what makes the difference.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just so... Thus, so have your own abilities
improved tenfold through your daily devotion to
me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the driving force of not only my own growth,
but of my trainer's as well!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hark! Behold the awe-inspiring wonder that is I!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't feel like a compliment, but I suppose
that's T.M. Opera O's way of saying she likes my
training methods.
